worldData.instructions:
A CRT running callable channels.
CLICK or SPACE — change the channel: static, plasma, self-playing Pong, boids… and CH 5: DREAM — the set remembering the worlds it has seen.
Pong and boids are real algorithms living in the hook; the tube just calls them.

stepHooks.author: fable
stepHooks.description: TV: channel input + the algorithms the channels display (self-playing Pong, boids murmuration).
